questions.question: What is good advice to follow to avoid excessive debt?
options: Engage in impulse buying to avoid unmanageable debt.
Use cosigners on loans so that they can be held responsible for excessive debt.
Notify creditors immediately when you know your payments will be late.
Think long term and be realistic about income and expenses.
questions.correctAnswer: Think long term and be realistic about income and expenses.
questions.Help: Avoiding debt requires planning and understanding your limits regarding future income versus spending.

questions.question: The disadvantage to paying just the minimum amount due on your credit card each month is that you
questions.Help: Paying only the minimum leads to accumulating interest on the remaining balance.

questions.question: Which of the following is most likely to occur if you wait until you are middle-aged to start investing?
options: You will not be able to retire.
You will make smarter financial decisions.
You will not risk your financial security.
You will avoid credit card debt.
questions.correctAnswer: You will not be able to retire.
questions.Help: Delaying investment significantly reduces the time for compound interest to grow your retirement funds.

questions.question: A lower annual percentage rate (APR) means __________ monthly payments.
questions.Help: APR is the cost of borrowing; lower interest rates reduce the total cost of the debt.

questions.question: How can a consumer find evidence of fraudulent credit accounts opened in their name?
options: Review credit reports for the creation of unauthorized credit accounts.
Obtain their credit score from a credit bureau.
Review credit card statements for unauthorized activity.
Contact their credit card company and ask if fraud has been detected.
questions.correctAnswer: Review credit reports for the creation of unauthorized credit accounts.
questions.Help: Credit reports consolidate all accounts, making it the best place to find unauthorized new accounts.

questions.question: Which of the following characteristics are necessary for entrepreneurs to be successful?
questions.Help: Entrepreneurs thrive by creating new value through creative and innovative ideas.

questions.question: How does self-understanding help you choose an appropriate career?
options: By identifying your aptitudes and skills
By helping you understand other people
By raising your level of self-esteem
questions.correctAnswer: By identifying your aptitudes and skills
questions.Help: Matching job roles with personal strengths leads to greater career fit and success.

questions.question: Participating in ongoing training and education programs often helps workers
questions.Help: Continuous learning ensures employees remain relevant and capable of taking on higher responsibilities.

questions.question: Which of the following exemplifies the time value of money?
options: Rachel placed $250 in a savings account and accumulated $12.50 in interest.
Sophie estimated that she uses 78% of her income to pay her bills.
Harrison paid the government $1,508 in property taxes last year.
Matthew decided to purchase a smartwatch from TeleTech.com for $199.
questions.correctAnswer: Rachel placed $250 in a savings account and accumulated $12.50 in interest.
questions.Help: The time value of money highlights that money earns more over time when invested.

questions.question: Why is it important for employees to learn occupational skills and also to develop good interpersonal skills?
questions.Help: Technical skills allow you to do the work, while interpersonal skills allow you to lead and advance.

questions.question: Which of the following is an expense that a typical car insurance policy will cover?
options: Injuries you cause to someone else in a car accident
Water leaking from the roof of your garage
Personal belongings stolen from your car
Damage to the stereo system you installed in your car
questions.correctAnswer: Injuries you cause to someone else in a car accident
questions.Help: Liability insurance is designed to cover damages or injuries caused to other parties.

questions.question: One of the best ways to protect yourself against identity theft is to
options: monitor your credit and bank accounts continuously.
pay for your purchases with debit cards.
use the same password for all online financial accounts.
questions.correctAnswer: monitor your credit and bank accounts continuously.
questions.Help: Vigilance is key to detecting unauthorized charges early.

questions.question: A premium is the regular __________ for an insurance policy.
questions.Help: The premium is the price paid to keep an insurance policy active.

questions.question: The purpose of a deductible is to
options: deter a large volume of insignificant insurance claims.
diversify an individual’s stock portfolio or mutual fund.
increase the cost of monthly insurance premiums.
promote open communication between team members.
questions.correctAnswer: deter a large volume of insignificant insurance claims.
questions.Help: Deductibles ensure that the insured party has 'skin in the game' for minor losses.

questions.question: When a business's insurance premiums are high, it is most often because the
questions.Help: Insurance companies charge more when the likelihood of a claim is higher.

questions.question: What is the main purpose of diversifying investments?
questions.Help: Spreading investments across different assets ensures that a single loss doesn't wipe out the whole portfolio.

questions.question: Alexander's savings account earns 1.50% in interest. Using the Rule of 72, how many years would it take for Alexander's savings to double?
questions.Help: The rule of 72 states: 72 / interest rate = years to double (72 / 1.5 = 48).

questions.question: Which of the following is often considered one of the safest types of investments?
questions.Help: Government bonds are backed by the full faith and credit of the governing entity, making them low-risk.

questions.question: One way to obtain reliable and up-to-date information about employment trends in a certain career or field is by
questions.Help: Government agencies provide the most objective and current data on labor markets.

questions.question: Why is it important to start early when planning for retirement?
options: To benefit from the time value of money
To ensure protections are in place for retirement plans
To take advantage of compounded interest
questions.correctAnswer: To take advantage of compounded interest
questions.Help: Compounding allows interest to grow on interest, which creates exponential growth over time.

questions.question: When monies are withheld from an employee's paycheck to cover taxes and insurance, these funds are the employee's
questions.Help: Money taken out of a paycheck before it hits your bank account are payroll deductions.

questions.question: Which of the following is a criterion for evaluating the reliability of a source?
questions.Help: Currency or timeliness is critical because facts change over time.

questions.question: When purchasing a durable good, consumers typically consider
options: whether they can get a discount.
whether their neighbors own the product.
how long the product will last.
questions.correctAnswer: how long the product will last.
questions.Help: Durable goods are specifically meant to provide utility over a long period.

questions.question: The single most important aspect of making a financial plan and setting goals is
questions.Help: Procrastination is the biggest enemy of financial success.

questions.question: Your annual income, inheritance, and money from the sale of an asset are all considered events that contribute toward
questions.Help: These are sources of income that the government requires you to pay taxes on.
